mission.title: Making productivity
mission.description: TaskFlow was born from a simple idea: managing tasks shouldn't be a task itself. We're building tools that fade into the background, so you can focus on the work that actually matters.

facts.title: Honest about where we are
facts.description: TaskFlow isn't a SaaS company with a marketing team. It's a working app you can run, read, and improve.

opensource.title: Open source
opensource.body: The full client and server source code lives in this repository. Inspect it, fork it, send improvements.

solo.title: Solo-built
solo.body: Designed, written, and maintained by a single developer. No team page, because that would be fiction.

feedback.title: Feedback-driven
feedback.body: The roadmap is shaped by real issues from real users — not surveys or quarterly OKRs.

values.title: What drives
values.description: These core principles guide every decision — from data model down to UI copy.

0.title: Focused simplicity
0.description: Strip away complexity so the user can focus on what truly matters — getting things done.

1.title: User first
1.description: Every feature is built with empathy. Listen, iterate, and ship what users actually need.

2.title: Continuous improvement
2.description: Small, steady changes that compound — not flashy redesigns that break workflows.

3.title: Trust & security
3.description: Your data integrity and privacy are non-negotiable. Hashed passwords, role-based access, JWT auth.

4.title: Performance matters
4.description: Speed is a feature. The stack is tuned so the UI never blocks on a request.

5.title: Community powered
5.description: Built with the community in mind. Your feedback shapes the roadmap, your PRs ship in releases.

team.title: The people behind
team.description: A passionate crew of builders, designers, and thinkers dedicated to crafting the best task management experience.
